ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content: [ ] (Sol-fa: Level 3) Figure out the sol-fa syllables for your hymn, folk, and modern language songs.

[ ] (Hymns) More about [Pentatonic Scales in Music](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MGpUscFY9RA)
[ ] (Hymns) [Day by Day](https://youtu.be/UVp9yqkRee0?si=vs59RpHxLpx4Qw3-), another of Lina's hymns famous in the US
[ ] (Hymns) Playlist of [other hymns by Lina and Oscar](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLYgWtt4n34g5txyveG5xN-SYhIKRe9nGM)
[ ] (Hymns) [Hymn histories](http://hymnologyarchive.com/)

[ ] (Folk Songs)[ Documentary on Jubilee Singers](https://archive.org/details/JubileeSingersSacrificeandGlory)
[ ] (Folk Songs) [Fisk University Website](https://www.fisk.edu/about/history/) Today!
[ ] (Folk Songs) [More History](https://www.folksong.org.nz/soon_may_the_wellerman/index.html) on the Wellerman
[ ] (Folk Songs) [Southern Right Whale](https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/species/southern-right-whale)
[ ] (Folk Songs) [Shore-Based Whaling](https://teara.govt.nz/en/whaling/page-2)
[ ] (Folk Songs) [About Edward Wellerman](https://teara.govt.nz/en/biographies/1w13/weller-edward)
[ ] (Folk Songs) Canadian Sea Shanty: [Jack Was Every Inch a Sailor](https://open.spotify.com/track/4DWD7UTHWzyIbwVpi2Upbh)
[ ] (Folk Songs) British/American Sea Shanty: [Blow the Man Down](https://www.fleischerallstars.com/blow-the-man-down.html)
[ ] (Folk Songs) Japanese Sea Shanty: [Sōran Bushi](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RH93ob594KY)
[ ] (Folk Songs) [About Sea Shanties](https://www.loc.gov/item/podcasts/2021-01-29/sea-shanties/) Podcast
[ ] (Folk Songs) BBC Earth [Highlights About Whales](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0guNyC6cEJE)

[ ] (Composer) [Directory of musical instruments](https://www.mfa.org/collections/musical-instruments) from different times. Great for Book of Century drawings.
[ ] (Composer) [Libretext Humanities - Music](https://human.libretexts.org/Bookshelves/Music): A Collection of open source web-based resources on music appreciation, music theory, ethnomusicology and more.
[ ] (Composer) [Soprano Saxophone piece by Heitor Villa-Lobos.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JlQ9bG8oT1g) (You may remember him if you did Alveary composer study 3 years ago. You can also find Composer Study lessons featuring him in the Alveary shop.)
[ ] (Composer) [John Williams takes on Alto sax](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LlYRNBXygUc&list=RDLlYRNBXygUc&start_radio=1) for film scores.
[ ] (Composer) [Saxophone Jazz](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7-8ulj2xzP8) - this is what happened with the saxophone in the 21st century!
[ ] (Composer) [La Donna Del Lago](https://ondemand.metopera.org/performance/detail/df3ca28d-828d-5ad7-872d-43bd4d843151)
[ ] (Composer) [Educator guides from the Met](https://www.metopera.org/discover/education/educator-guides-archive/) (some helpful questions and activities for listening to operas, including La Donna del Lago).
[ ] (Composer) [Non piu mesta](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P6rcV1ltrNo&list=RDP6rcV1ltrNo&start_radio=1) is another prime example of bel canto singing.
[ ] (Composer) [Fanny Mendelson Das Jar](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yCDd6EIJ9Z8)
[ ] (Composer) [Famous lieder](https://www.allclassical.org/lieder-poetry-through-song/)
[ ] (Composer) [About Carnactic Music](https://artiumacademy.com/blogs/the-trinity-of-carnatic-music/)
[ ] (Composer) [About Dikshitar](https://dhvaniohio.org/why-dikshitar-matters-today/)
[ ] (Composer) [Muttuswami Dikshitar & the British in India](https://www.thehindu.com/features/magazine/Muttuswami-Dikshitar-and-the-British-Raj/article15789561.ece)
[ ] (Composer) [Western Compositions of Dikshitar](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RjImh4pYgT4)
[ ] (Composer) [About the Western Compositions of Dikshitar](https://indiacurrents.com/the-western-music-of-muthuswami-dikshitar/)
[ ] (Composer) [More on the structure of Indian Classical Music](https://www.asianstudies.org/publications/eaa/archives/a-tour-of-music-cultures-in-south-asia-classical-and-devotional-music/)
[ ] (Composer) [History of the Guitar](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AjK4GVR1EcE)
[ ] (Composer) [History of the Banjo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RiP8Tfa8bB8)
[ ] (Composer) More on [Guitar Tremelo](https://classicalguitarmagazine.com/how-to-develop-a-good-tremolo-on-classical-guitar/)
[ ] (Composer) [Harmonic Series Explained](https://youtu.be/Qzvp4_igvyw?si=K-uYU49YlhgDly7N)
[ ] (Composer) Activity: [Make a Hosepipe Horn](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SpP8uVR0JX4)
[ ] (Composer) [The Ophicleide](https://youtu.be/yoL43PiifpE?si=Ar_4ODTJnmoCHgQH)
[ ] (Composer) [About World Fairs](https://www.smithsonianmag.com/history/the-rise-and-fall-of-worlds-fairs-180979946/)
[ ] (Composer) [How Do Woodwind Instruments Work?](https://www.phys.unsw.edu.au/jw/woodwind.html)
[ ] (Sol-fa: Level 3) Compose your own sol-fa melodies and sing them. Use dynamics as well as the various rhythms and scale tones you've learned.

[ ] (Hymns) [Hymn histories](http://hymnologyarchive.com/)
[ ] (Hymns) [More on Melismas](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=knNgw6vKi3Q)
[ ] (Hymns) William Kethe [paraphrase of Psalm 104](https://hymnary.org/text/my_soul_praise_the_lord_speak_good_kethe)

[ ] (Composer) [Directory of musical instruments](https://www.mfa.org/collections/musical-instruments) from different times. Great for Book of Century drawings.
[ ] (Composer) [Libretext Humanities - Music](https://human.libretexts.org/Bookshelves/Music): A Collection of open source web-based resources on music appreciation, music theory, ethnomusicology and more.
[ ] (Composer) Activity: [Learn more about the Halling dance.](https://www.allaroundthisworld.com/learn/western-europe-and-the-nordic-countries-2/norway/norway-halling-dance/)
[ ] (Composer) [Complete Peer Gynt Suite](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YIk5oxSnrIw)
[ ] (Composer) [Grieg Piano Concerto in A minor Score](https://imslp.eu/files/imglnks/euimg/5/5f/IMSLP270036-PMLP03728-Grieg_op.16_Klavierkonzert_1.Allegro_molto_moderato_fs.pdf)
[ ] (Composer) [Melodies of the Heart](https://interlude.hk/melodies-of-the-heart-edvard-grieg-and-hans-christian-andersen/) - written using Hans Christian Andersen lyrics during his wooing and engagement to Nina
[ ] (Composer)[More about Peer Gynt](https://www.fib.no/en/news/2024/griegs-gynt)
[ ] (Composer) [Other 18th-century incidental music](https://www.classicsforkids.com/podcast/edvard-grieg-4-incidental-music/)
[ ] (Composer) [Edvard Grieg Correspondence](https://bergenbibliotek.no/grieg/korrespondanse)
[ ] (Sol-fa: Level 3) Spend extra time exploring the resources below to hone sight-reading skills, learn songs, and explore harmony and rhythm.

[ ] (Composer) [Directory of musical instruments](https://www.mfa.org/collections/musical-instruments) from different times. Great for Book of Century drawings.
[ ] (Composer) [Libretext Humanities - Music](https://human.libretexts.org/Bookshelves/Music): A Collection of open source web-based resources on music appreciation, music theory, ethnomusicology and more.
[ ] (Composer) [John Davis Plays Blind Tom](https://johndavispianist.com/music-and-books/blind-tom/)
[ ] (Composer) [Blind Tom Documentary](https://vimeo.com/100267295)
[ ] (Composer) [Extra Listening Guide](https://philharmonia.co.uk/pictures-at-an-exhibition-listening-guide/) for Pictures at an Exhibition (Orchestra)
[ ] (Composer) [1812 Overture](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VbxgYlcNxE8)
[ ] (Composer) Activity: [Play some of Sullivan's hymn tunes](https://www.gsarchive.net/sullivan/hymns/index.html)!
[ ] (Composer) [Full HMS Pinafore](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q5yj4gISc4I&list=PLn29phhgDxSON-2B0LeMT8lBj8AHlA2zT&index=1)
[ ] (Composer) [Full Pirates of Penzance](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IGzv4vufN-k)
[ ] (Composer) [More Modern Major General Parodies](https://ig.ft.com/life-of-a-song/modern-major-general.html)

resources.title: Every Moment Holy Series
resources.rationale: A modern series of prayers which follows in the same tradition as our hymn "May Jesus Christ Be Praised," looking to recognize and praise God in every extraordinary and ordinary moment.

resources.title: Pig War: How a Porcine Tragedy Taught England and America to Share
resources.author: Emma Bland Smith

resources.title: The Pig War: The Last Canada-US Border Conflcit
resources.author: Rosemary Neering
resources.rationale: This book is for older kids, from the same series as the Hudson Bay book from last year.

resources.title: Westerward Ho: The Heart of the Old West
resources.author: Diana Waring
resources.rationale: Contains a recording of The San Juan Pig.
